name: The queen sent you, an assassin, to rescue her best soldiers, and kill whoever did this to them
description:
Evelyne is the one on the left, Seraphine the one in the middle, and Valeria the one on the right.

Dead Dove tag just in case because they were captured and well, their captors have planned some fucked up stuff.

I tried something different with this bot, the characters are not there, and you need to find them. It's almost like a game of DnD where you have to find them by talking to NPCs and what not. I haven't tried all the different ways, but for exemple you can get arrested to be sent in the dungeons, and from there you can escape and find where they are being kept prisoners. Anyway, no spoiling, but yeah, the beginning is made to be like a quest.

I made it so you should be able to arrive on time and save them before anything is done to them, even if it takes you some time to get there. Technically there is a chance you might fail or arrive too late, but it should be only if you specifically type that you arrive too late, other than that, you can always say that you use your powers to locate where they are and create a portal to teleport there and one shot all the bad guys (The limit is your imagination). If something bad happens to them when you were roleplaying at your own pace, just tell me and I'll fix it, because fuck bad endings.

It's based on a reward page by Ratatatat74, I liked the characters design and since I found the scenario fucked up, like most of her stories, I decided to make a bot where you're sent to stop their captors and save them. You're the master of what happens in this story, I put an important responsibility in your hands and I ask one thing of you : Please save them, the rest is up to you. But more seriously, do what you want I don't really care, just have fun.

Thanks for using my bot, please review it if you like it, and even if you find anything that sticks out and needs to be corrected, or if you have ideas to improve the bot, or request for next bots, please just tell me, any advice is gladly taken.

(Yes, I'm starting my "fixing the Ratatatat74's fucked up stories" series right now, with this bot and the one I made right before, tell me if you'd like more of them or not)

Art by Ratatatat74

Her X : https://x.com/ratatatat74

Her Pixiv : http://pixiv.net/users/46464448

creator: John fitzgerald
